summary: Update the README C10 row to reflect the newly wired provider/composer/diff runtime while naming the remaining model, context, persistence hydration, agent, and hosted gates.

decisions.decision: Describe the AI runtime bridge and per-hunk review as implemented, while retaining explicit pending language for unimplemented model/context/agent features and hosted acceptance.
decisions.rationale: N-7 requires the README to track actual committed seams without turning partial C10 work into a completion claim.

testEvidence.criterion: The documentation reflects the exact committed C10 boundary and remains clean.
testEvidence.test: Run diff and provenance checks once after the status correction.

red.outcome: RED: the README still described provider/composer/diff wiring as pending after those seams were committed.

green.outcome: GREEN: diff check exited 0; provenance ledger passed validation.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
